creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Comment on attachment 206066
raylib.diff

This still fails.  What about

[00:03:59] Error: Orphaned: lib/cmake/raylib/raylib-config-version.cmake
[00:03:59] Error: Orphaned: lib/cmake/raylib/raylib-config.cmake

?

Please test it with `poudriere testport` or at least with `make
check-plist` before submitting a new version of the patch.
